title: command blocks update
description: replaces boring command block texture to new and more smooth one.
body:
# COMMAND BLOCKS UPDATE

### This resoursepack replaces command block texture to more smooth one. Now impulsive command block has a smooth red sandstone texture, chain command block - prismarine and repeating command block has a bubble coral block texture.

*I think that vanilla comand blocks texture is boring and I changed it.*

*P.S.: Command blocks still have animation*

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Rubk9286/images/cb2146455089dc2cecf14e1be57a061aac629cd6.png)
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Rubk9286/images/129a59ed067d4cd9c75dabb2989b75103e4b0edc.png)
